## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and what problem does it solve? -->

## How it was verified

<!-- Tick what you ran. CI runs typecheck · test · build on every PR. -->

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` clean
- [ ] `pnpm test` green
- [ ] `pnpm build` green
- [ ] Ran the site / Lab and checked the behavior + console (for engine or UI changes)

## Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots. -->

<!-- Public API change? Note it in the CHANGELOG under [Unreleased] (see RELEASING.md). -->
